message:
fix: add TOCTOU re-verification before destructive cleanup actions (gt-23rl1)

The daemon heartbeat loop performs orphan cleanup and zombie scanning, but
between the time a session/process is identified and the time it is killed,
the state may have changed. This adds re-verification immediately before
each destructive action:

- checkRigOrphanedWork: re-verify session dead + hook_bead before notifying
- checkPolecatHealth: re-verify session still dead before restarting
- ZombieSessionCheck.Fix: re-verify Claude still dead before killing session
- CleanupOrphanedClaudeProcesses: re-verify process still orphaned before SIGTERM
- CleanupZombieClaudeProcesses: re-verify process still zombie before SIGTERM

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
